message:
test(spring): add 27 edge-case tests for Spring damped harmonic oscillator (bd-3r5rp)

Cover clone independence, debug format, negative stiffness clamping,
with_rest_threshold/with_velocity_threshold builders (positive & negative),
initial==target immediate settling, normalized() constructor, negative impulse,
impulse on moving spring (additive velocity), set_target within/beyond
rest_threshold wake behavior, large rest_threshold early settling,
value() clamping for negative positions and above-1.0 targets, zero-damping
oscillation, advance at-rest no-op, reset restoring initial+zero velocity,
reset after impulse, multiple chained set_target convergence, preset parameter
verification (gentle/bouncy/stiff/slow/critical), critical preset is
critically damped (c = 2*sqrt(k)).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
